title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: This is a brief personal reflection by Professor David J. Malan of Harvard University describing how he came to pursue computer science. The video is part of CS50, Harvard's introduction to computer science course offered through multiple platforms including edX and Harvard Extension School.
writeup: This CS50 video features Professor David J. Malan recounting his personal path to discovering computer science as his field. It sits within CS50, Harvard University's foundational computer science course covering the intellectual enterprises of the discipline and the art of programming. The takeaway is a firsthand account of how Malan arrived at computer science, framed as context for the broader course.
